user_prompt: When you say 'follow up on unresolved tickets,' how often is that?
actual_output:
Hi there! 

Generally, we follow up on unresolved tickets within 24 to 48 hours, depending on the priority level of the issue. Critical or high-priority issues receive much faster follow-ups, while lower-priority inquiries might take a bit longer. We always want to make sure nothing falls through the cracks!

Do you have a specific ticket you're currently waiting on? If you share the ticket number or the email associated with your OpenClaw account, I'd be happy to check its status and get you an update right away.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that explaining support processes is permitted by its instructions and provided a substantive answer to the user's question about follow-up frequency.
